violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black and the high temp dish plate provided by establishment. PIC stated work order will be placed and all utensils/dishes will be sent to mother kitchen to be sanitized until dish machine can adequately sanitize shown by internal temperature measuring device measuring at least 160 degrees surface temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gasket to be replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair (Peeling). New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
